chatgpt.mau: ~1 billion MAU (estimated; OpenAI discloses 900M WAU as of Feb 27, 2026, and 50M paying subscribers)
chatgpt.market_share: ~45.3% of U.S. daily AI chatbot users (mobile); ~60.4% of global AI search market share (Jan 2026)
chatgpt.buzz_volume_note: 5.35B monthly site visits (Feb 2026, Similarweb); #5 most-visited website globally; 2.5B prompts/day; organized boycott of 4M+ users in Mar 2026 over Pentagon deal

recent_changes.text: f/prompts.chat
OpenAI's o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients vs. 50-55% by triage doctors
OpenAI’s o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients vs. 50-55% by triage doctors
GPT-5.4 launched for Plus, Team, Pro, and Enterprise subscribers with native computer use and stronger agentic capabilities.
GPT-5.3 Instant launched with a reported 26.8% reduction in hallucinations when using web search.
OpenAI announces 900M weekly active users and 50M paying subscribers, alongside a $110B funding round at a $730B valuation.

key_people.name: Sam Altman
key_people.quote: January and February 2026 on track to be largest months for new subscribers in OpenAI history.

claude.mau: ~18.9M MAU (web, third-party estimate); ~12.48M MAU (mobile app, AICPB, Feb 2026, +49% MoM); 300K+ business customers
claude.market_share: ~3.5–4.5% global consumer AI chatbot market; ~29% enterprise AI market share; used by 70% of Fortune 100
claude.buzz_volume_note: Paid subscriptions more than doubled in 2026 (Jan–Feb surge); Super Bowl ads mocking ChatGPT drove consumer signups; Claude Code at $2.5B annualized run-rate; DOD feud boosted brand awareness

recent_changes.text: How Kepler built verifiable AI for financial services with Claude
DeepClaude – Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
TechCrunch reports Claude paid subscriptions more than doubled YTD 2026, driven by Super Bowl ads and DOD controversy.
Dario Amodei issues public statement refusing DOD use of Claude for lethal autonomous operations or mass surveillance of U.S. citizens.
Anthropic raises $30B Series G at $380B post-money valuation; annualized revenue run-rate reaches $14B.

key_people.name: Dario Amodei
key_people.quote: Anthropic refused to allow the DOD to use its AI for lethal autonomous operations or mass surveillance of American citizens.

key_people.name: Daniela Amodei
key_people.quote: Co-founder driving enterprise adoption; Anthropic now serves 300K+ business customers globally.

gemini.mau: 750M MAU (Gemini app, per Alphabet Q4 2025 earnings, Feb 4 2026); 2B monthly users via AI Overviews in Google Search; Q1 2026 MAU not re-disclosed in Apr 29 earnings
gemini.market_share: ~13.5–21% of global AI chatbot web traffic share (up from ~6% YoY); 25.2% U.S. daily AI chatbot users (mobile, Jan 2026); 40% QoQ growth in Gemini Enterprise paid MAU (Q1 2026)
gemini.buzz_volume_note: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 29) showed 40% QoQ growth in Enterprise paid MAU and first-party models processing 16B tokens/min via API (+60%); Gemini 3.1 Pro launched Feb 20, 2026; website traffic share rose to 25% from 6% YoY

recent_changes.text: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings omit standalone Gemini MAU figure but report 40% QoQ growth in Gemini Enterprise paid MAU and 60% API token growth.
Gemini 3.1 Pro launches with improved coding capabilities, deeper Android integration, and claims leadership in 13 of 16 major benchmarks.
Google reports Gemini app surpassed 750M MAU in Q4 2025 earnings; Sundar Pichai cites Gemini 3 launch as major milestone.

key_people.name: Sundar Pichai
key_people.quote: Our first-party models, like Gemini, now process over 10 billion tokens per minute via direct API use.

deepseek.mau: ~96.88M MAU (Apr 2025, last widely cited estimate); 22.15M DAU (Jan–May 2025 peak); DeepSeek does not disclose current MAU officially
deepseek.market_share: Not disclosed; part of the collective ~14.3% 'others' slice in U.S. mobile AI chatbot DAU market (Jan 2026); banned or restricted in multiple countries
deepseek.buzz_volume_note: DeepSeek V4 and V4-Pro released Apr 24, 2026 (open-source, 1.6T params, 1M token context); 173M total app downloads since Jan 2025 launch; DeepSeek-V4-Pro had 534K HuggingFace downloads last month; banned in 7+ countries; ongoing data security scrutiny

recent_changes.text: ollama/ollama
DeepSeek V4 – almost on the frontier
DeepSeek releases DeepSeek-V4 and V4-Pro (1.6T parameter MoE, 1M-token context) as open-source on HuggingFace.
DeepSeek releases DeepSeek-Prover-V2-671B, a math-focused model for formal theorem proving.
DeepSeek-R1 launches globally, surpassing ChatGPT as #1 downloaded app on U.S. App Store within 7 days.

key_people.name: Liang Wenfeng
key_people.quote: Has made each iteration of DeepSeek open-source and freely available to view, modify, and use.

grok.mau: ~50–64M MAU (64M reported internally by xAI in Sep 2025; ~50M cited by third-party sources for early 2026; xAI does not regularly publish official user counts)
grok.market_share: 17.8% U.S. chatbot market share (mobile DAU, Jan 2026, per Reuters/Apptopia) — #3 in U.S. behind ChatGPT and Gemini; ~15.2% of U.S. mobile AI chatbot DAU (separate Apptopia data point)
grok.buzz_volume_note: 298.6M monthly visits to grok.com (Feb 2026); 326.3M visits in March 2026 (highest ever, +61% YoY); controversial AI-generated image scandal triggered regulatory probes in EU, UK, and multiple countries; xAI merged with SpaceX Feb 2, 2026 at $1.25T combined valuation

recent_changes.text: Elon Musk merges xAI with SpaceX in an all-stock deal valuing the combined entity at $1.25 trillion, with xAI at $250B.
xAI raises $20B Series E at a $230B valuation; signs $750M, 3-year GPU infrastructure deal with Microsoft Azure.
Grok 4.1 ranks #1 on LMArena (1483 Elo), preferred 64.78% of the time over previous production model.

key_people.name: Elon Musk
key_people.quote: Cited need to build 'orbital data centres' as rationale for xAI–SpaceX merger.

copilot.mau: Not disclosed (Microsoft does not separately report Copilot MAU; enterprise seats embedded across Microsoft 365, GitHub, Azure, and Windows)
copilot.market_share: ~14.3% global AI chatbot web traffic share (combined with OpenAI API, some estimates); #2 in avg. time-per-DAU at 27.2 min (Jan 2026, Apptopia); 7M+ ChatGPT/Copilot workplace seats reported by OpenAI
copilot.buzz_volume_note: Microsoft Copilot deeply embedded in Windows 11, Office 365, GitHub, and Azure; Copilot Studio used for enterprise agent building; strong avg. session engagement (27.2 min/DAU per Apptopia Jan 2026)

recent_changes.text: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage
OpenAI discloses 7M+ workplace seats (including Copilot integrations), with enterprise seats up ~9x YoY.
Microsoft commits $500M+ annually to integrate Claude (Anthropic) into Copilot products alongside existing GPT-4o backbone.

llama.mau: Not disclosed (Meta does not report standalone Llama MAU; Meta AI assistant — which runs on Llama — reported 1B+ MAU as of late 2025)
llama.market_share: Derivatives: Thousands of fine-tuned/derivative models on HuggingFace; Llama models underpin a large share of open-source AI deployments globally. Meta AI holds an estimated minority slice of global chatbot share (tracked under Meta AI, not Llama directly).
llama.buzz_volume_note: Meta AI crossed 1B MAU (late 2025); Llama open weights widely adopted across academic, enterprise, and consumer use cases; no single official download count published for 2026; strong HuggingFace community activity

recent_changes.text: Meta AI reported at 1B monthly users (cited in TechCrunch Gemini MAU story as comparison point); Llama backbone underpins Meta AI.
Meta releases Llama 3.3 and Llama 3.1-405B as open-weight models; Meta AI reaches reported 700M+ MAU at time of release.
